overall.description: Gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing first-person driving through a neon-lit futuristic city at night. The vehicle travels from under a red overpass, through open streets with palm trees, under a covered bridge with traditional Asian architectural elements, and into a commercial district with pedestrians and digital billboards. Wet road surfaces reflect the vibrant neon signage throughout the journey.

segments.scene_description: Driving through an open commercial district lined with shops and pedestrians. Large digital billboards illuminate the left side of the street while pedestrians walk along the right sidewalk. The red car ahead continues to lead the way as the vehicle progresses through the neon-lit urban environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous drive through a neon-lit futuristic city, transitioning from a claustrophobic industrial underpass into a vibrant, open commercial district. It begins by following a white sedan beneath a red industrial overpass with graffiti-covered walls before emerging into an open urban street lined with palm trees. As the vehicle progresses, the wet asphalt reflects the surrounding colorful signage, leading the camera toward and through a covered bridge featuring ornate columns and traditional Asian architectural elements. The scene then shifts from this sheltered corridor back into the open air, following a red sedan into a bustling commercial district. Finally, the view expands to reveal large digital billboards and pedestrians lining the sidewalks as the vehicle continues its journey through the illuminated city.
